Name: MASTER BALL
Description:
The best BALL that
catches a POKÉMON
without fail.

Name: ULTRA BALL
Description:
A better BALL with

than a GREAT BALL.

A good BALL with a
higher catch rate
than a POKÉ BALL.

Name: POKÉ BALL
Description:
A tool used for
catching wild
POKÉMON.

Name: SAFARI BALL

A special BALL that

Name: NET BALL

A BALL that works

Name: DIVE BALL
Description:
A BALL that works

Name: NEST BALL

Name: REPEAT BALL

A BALL that works

Name: TIMER BALL
Description:
A BALL that gains

Name: LUXURY BALL

Name: PREMIER BALL

Name: TM01

Name: TM25
Description:

Name: TM27
Description:
The more the user
likes you, the more
